text: India is the most populous country in the world.
The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
The COVID-19 vaccine contains microchips to track people.
India launched the Chandrayaan-3 mission to the Moon in 2023.
The Amazon river is the longest river in the world.
Albert Einstein failed mathematics in school.
India became a member of the United Nations in 1945.
5G technology causes cancer.
The human body has 206 bones.
India won the ICC Cricket World Cup in 2023.
The Paris Agreement was signed in 2015.
Elon Musk acquired Twitter and rebranded it to X.
Drinking eight glasses of water per day is a scientific recommendation.
India's GST was implemented on July 1, 2017.
The moon landing in 1969 was staged by NASA in a Hollywood studio.
Mahatma Gandhi was born in Gujarat on October 2, 1869.
Mount Everest is located in China.
The Reserve Bank of India was established in 1935.
India has never won a gold medal at the Olympics.
